[TITLE]: POTD: Nails & Oberland Arms OA-15 | thefirearmblog.com
[METADATA/INTRO]: POTD: Nails & Oberland Arms OA-15 Today’s Photo Of The Day is Emmy’s OA-15 in custom Cerakote, and her matching nails....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: POTD: Nails & Oberland Arms OA-15 
 Today’s Photo Of The Day is Emmy’s OA-15 in custom Cerakote, and her matching nails. 
 The rifle is a semi-automatic Oberland Arms OA-15 with an 18″ barrel (made by Lothar Walther) chambered in .223 Remington. 
 The stock is a Battlelink minimalist and the sight is a Vortex Diamondback Tactical 4-16×44 FFP and reticle EBR-2C. The mount is from Vortex too. 
 Below: A sweet rifle requires sweets. 
 Oberland Arms is a German manufacturer of AR15 rifles. You can find their Homepage here: http://www.oberlandarms.com/ 
 Oberland Arms established in 1998 is one of the leading companies in Europe for premium semi automatic rifles.
